# LinguaQuest

> AI-powered language learning for school students. Practice real-life conversations in English, German, and French through roleplay with friendly AI characters.

LinguaQuest teaches communication through real situations — friendships, school, leadership, presentations, customer service, job interviews — instead of isolated vocabulary drills. Designed for children and teenagers.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Levels, scenarios, characters overview
- [Characters](/characters): Meet the six AI conversation partners
- [Progress](/progress): Stars, streaks, badges, confidence and fluency
